[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111111 6
1 1101010 4
2 1100010 3
3 0100100 2
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

23 32 0000101 2
34 43 0001101 3

56 65 1100010 3 match 2
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 0000000 a match 4 5 6 7
